title: Spirograph Machine
description: Paint mathematical roulette curves — hypotrochoid, epitrochoid, rose & Lissajous — with layering, real-time animation & PNG export.
concept: A full parametric-curve studio built around the classic spirograph toy. Choose from four curve families, dial in R/r/d ratios or frequency pairs, then watch your design grow line by line in real time. Stack up to five independent layers, mix three colour modes (solid, fade, rainbow), and export the finished piece as a PNG or share the exact settings via a URL hash.
features: 4 curve types: Hypotrochoid, Epitrochoid, Rose, Lissajous
Layer system — up to 5 independent drawing layers with toggle/delete
Animated incremental drawing with configurable speed
PNG export + URL-hash sharing of current parameters

interaction.mouse: Click presets or swatches to configure
interaction.click: Draw / Stop / Add Layer / Export / Share
interaction.touch: Full touch support on all controls
